reasoning:
Vaishali's FIDE rating for October 2025 is 2473. To be at least 1% higher, her rating would need to reach 2497.73 (rounded to 2498) on the upcoming FIDE lists. FIDE lists are released on the 1st of each month. 
For her rating to hit 2498 on the November 2025 list (which covers the resolution dates of Nov 2 and Nov 25), she would have to gain 25 rating points strictly from games played in October. Having just concluded a grueling performance to win the Women's Grand Swiss in September, she is unlikely to play a packed schedule in October. Moreover, gaining 25 rating points when K=10 is extremely difficult, requiring a roughly +2.5 performance score beyond expectations (equivalent to ~5 consecutive wins against equally-rated peers, or a very long tournament with an incredible score). Therefore, the probability for the November resolution dates is very low. Even if the Wikipedia page updates late, a lingering October rating (2473) would result in exactly 0% growth, resolving as NO. 
Looking to January 2026, she will have three months (October - December) to accumulate points. Given her historical peaks (breaking 2500 in mid-2024), finding form again is plausible over this longer horizon, raising the probability. Adjusting for forecast horizon uncertainty, the predicted probability trends towards 0.5 for the later dates.
